overall_qual.description: Overall material and finish quality (1 = Very Poor, 10 = Very Excellent)

gr_liv_area.description: Above grade (ground) living area in square feet

garage_area.description: Size of garage in square feet (0 = no garage)

total_bsmt_sf.description: Total basement area in square feet (0 = no basement)

full_bath.description: Number of full bathrooms above grade

mas_vnr_area.description: Masonry veneer area in square feet (0 = none)

bsmt_qual.description: Basement height/quality (NA = no basement, Po = Poor, Fa = Fair, TA = Typical, Gd = Good, Ex = Excellent)

exter_qual.description: Exterior material quality (Po = Poor, Fa = Fair, TA = Typical, Gd = Good, Ex = Excellent)

kitchen_qual.description: Kitchen quality (Po = Poor, Fa = Fair, TA = Typical, Gd = Good, Ex = Excellent)

fireplace_qu.description: Fireplace quality (NA = no fireplace, Po = Poor, Fa = Fair, TA = Typical, Gd = Good, Ex = Excellent)

neighborhood.description: Physical location within Ames city limits
